run.prompt: найди самый дешевый MacBook Air M2 в Украине

tasks.focus: Find broad current OLX listings for MacBook Air M2 in Ukraine; record the lowest real purchasable prices and exclude accessories, parts, and wanted ads.
Check base 13-inch 2022 MacBook Air M2 8GB/256GB offers, usually the cheapest configuration; verify condition, battery cycles, location, and seller credibility.
Search Russian-language OLX listings that may not appear in English queries; compare lowest prices and confirm they are complete working laptops.

verified.evidence: Active ad for 18,850 UAH. Front camera not working and minor screen backlight spots, clean iCloud, 94% battery. | OLX notebook search result shows M2 A2681, 8/256, 94% battery, used, 20300 грн | OLX result shows M2 Air A2681, 8/256GB, 94% battery, used, 20300 грн | Title verifies M2 2022, 8/256, A2681 and 94% battery; OLX shows used and 18 300 грн; delivery/seller trust not visible; unusually low price | OLX result shows 18 300 грн, Вживане, 94% АКБ; price far below nearby M2 Air offers, scam/issue risk | OLX search card lists this full-spec Air M2 offer at 18 300 грн, Вживане, 94% battery | Live OLX search result shows MacBook Air M2 A2681 listing, 18 300 грн, used, Dnipro. | Exact ID10hhmS not found live; closest active OLX laptop-category result shows M2 A2681, 8/256GB, 94% battery, 18 300 грн, used.
verified.shipping: Local pickup or shipping by agreement
